options.name: -reset
options.description: Resets all or specified options to default value

options.name: -earlyGlobalEffortLevel
options.description: {low|medium|standard} Specifies the congestion effort level. Default is "standard", where congestion is more accurate and runtime is larger. If set to "medium", runtime will be much smaller and congestion report will have less accuracy. Setting to "low", it will be faster than "medium" however less accurate.

options.name: -earlyGlobalNumTracksPerClockWire
options.description: <value> Specify special number of tracks per clock wires.

options.name: -earlyGlobalReverseDirection
options.description: Reverse routing direction in the given region on the specified layer-range. Example: "(x1 y1 x2 y2) M1:M2 (x3 y3 x4 y4) M3:M4 ..."

options.name: -earlyGlobalRouteBumpNets
options.description: Do not ignore special nets if they are connecting bumps

options.name: -earlyGlobalRoutePartitionAllowFeedthru
options.description: <value> Honor partition fences with feedthrough for <list_of_ptn_cell_names>.

options.name: -earlyGlobalRoutePartitionHonorPin
options.description: <value> Honor partition fences and single-entry constraint for <list_of_ptn_cell_names>.

options.name: -earlyGlobalRoutePartitionPinGuide
options.description: {true|false} Honor partition pin guides. Default is true

options.name: -earlyGlobalRouteSecondPG
options.description: Specifies whether secondary PG pins needs to be routed or not

options.name: -earlyGlobalRouteSelectedNetsOnly
options.description: {true|false} Only route the nets which are selected in the DB.

options.name: -earlyGlobalRouteStripeLayerRange
options.description: <value> Route secondary PG pins to access to the PG stripes in the given layer range.

options.name: -earlyGlobalSecondPGMaxFanout
options.description: Specifies the max fanout limit for each secondary PG subnet
